title: stellaria ovata var. palmeri
intro: Stellaria ovata var. palmeri, also known as Palmer's starwort or Western starwort, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe digestive issues. Stellaria ovata var. palmeri is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of illness.
